dataset.title: iNaturalist Research-grade Observations
dataset.description:
Observations from iNaturalist.org, an online social network of people sharing biodiversity information to help each other learn about nature.

Observations included in this archive met the following requirements:

* Published under one of the following licenses or waivers: 1) https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/, 2) https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/, 3) https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/

* Achieved one of following iNaturalist quality grades: Research

* Created on or before 2026-06-15 15:00:19 -0700

You can view observations meeting these requirements at https://www.inaturalist.org/observations?created_d2=2026-06-15+15%3A00%3A19+-0700&d1=1600-01-01&license=CC0%2CCC-BY%2CCC-BY-NC&quality_grade=research
dataset.purpose: iNaturalist.org is a website where anyone can record their observations from nature. Members record observations for numerous reasons, including participation in citizen science projects, school projects, and personal fulfillment.
